serverInfo.name: Arsenal Decision Engine
serverInfo.description: Deterministic Risk Oracle for DeFAI Agents. Transforms mempool uncertainty into actionable execution signals.

authentication.description: Lightning Network micro-payment authentication required for full diagnostic data and actionable recommendations.

resources.name: Latest AI Cost Intelligence Audit
resources.description: Diagnostic and financial teaser report of detected agent loop inefficiencies.

tools.name: protect_capital_from_mev
tools.description: Analyzes a pending Uniswap V2 swap for MEV sandwich attack risk. Returns ROI-based capital protection signals with O(1) determinism. Use before executing any DEX swap to verify safety from front-running.

victim_weth_in.description: Amount of WETH the victim intends to swap. Example: 10.5 means 10.5 WETH.

attacker_weth_in.description: Estimated flash-loan or capital size of the MEV searcher. If unknown, use 5x victim_weth_in.

tools.name: circuit_breaker
tools.description: Emergency kill switch for runaway agent processes. Terminates a process to stop uncontrolled token consumption or infinite loops. Use when cost monitoring shows unexpected spending spikes.

action.description: TERMINATE_AND_REGROUP kills immediately. MONITOR observes without intervention.

target_pid.description: Process identifier of the agent to target. Example: '12345'.

tools.name: cache_manager
tools.description: Controls semantic cache to reduce redundant vector DB queries and LLM calls. Reduces costs 40-60% for repetitive analysis. Do not use when real-time accuracy is critical.

action.description: ENABLE activates cache (TTL 5min). DISABLE flushes cache and resumes live computation.
